## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential SEO collaboration between Tenor and FWD Digital for Tenor's growth strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/xqB1UdeT2UKmf2Ehxjnu65NR4RYAEK9i?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Tenor, an AI-driven management effectiveness startup, seeks to boost discovery and visibility for their new product category](https://fathom.video/share/xqB1UdeT2UKmf2Ehxjnu65NR4RYAEK9i?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [FWD Digital offers AI-powered content strategy and production services, with a focus on organic growth and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/xqB1UdeT2UKmf2Ehxjnu65NR4RYAEK9i?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Both companies are in early stages, with Tenor having raised a $5.4M seed round and FWD Digital growing rapidly with 25 clients in 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/xqB1UdeT2UKmf2Ehxjnu65NR4RYAEK9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [There's mutual interest in exploring an SEO partnership in the new year, leveraging FWD's expertise to enhance Tenor's online presence](https://fathom.video/share/xqB1UdeT2UKmf2Ehxjnu65NR4RYAEK9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)

## Topics

### Tenor's Current Situation and Needs

  - [Raised $5.4M seed round (unannounced)](https://fathom.video/share/xqB1UdeT2UKmf2Ehxjnu65NR4RYAEK9i?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [New product category in AI for leadership development](https://fathom.video/share/xqB1UdeT2UKmf2Ehxjnu65NR4RYAEK9i?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Current customer acquisition: LinkedIn outbound, email, and phone (SDR)](https://fathom.video/share/xqB1UdeT2UKmf2Ehxjnu65NR4RYAEK9i?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Seeking to increase discovery and visibility for potential customers](https://fathom.video/share/xqB1UdeT2UKmf2Ehxjnu65NR4RYAEK9i?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Clear on Ideal Customer Profile (ICP), unlikely to change](https://fathom.video/share/xqB1UdeT2UKmf2Ehxjnu65NR4RYAEK9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)

### FWD Digital's Offerings and Approach

  - [AI-powered content strategy and production](https://fathom.video/share/xqB1UdeT2UKmf2Ehxjnu65NR4RYAEK9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Custom knowledge base creation for competitive advantage](https://fathom.video/share/xqB1UdeT2UKmf2Ehxjnu65NR4RYAEK9i?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [Programmatic and editorial content creation processes](https://fathom.video/share/xqB1UdeT2UKmf2Ehxjnu65NR4RYAEK9i?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [Link-building strategies for early-stage companies](https://fathom.video/share/xqB1UdeT2UKmf2Ehxjnu65NR4RYAEK9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [Minimal client involvement required (30-min weekly/bi-weekly meetings)](https://fathom.video/share/xqB1UdeT2UKmf2Ehxjnu65NR4RYAEK9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### SEO Strategy for Early-Stage Startups

  - [Focus on long-tail, low-volume keywords initially](https://fathom.video/share/xqB1UdeT2UKmf2Ehxjnu65NR4RYAEK9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Gradual build-up of domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/xqB1UdeT2UKmf2Ehxjnu65NR4RYAEK9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [Programmatic link-building to complement content creation](https://fathom.video/share/xqB1UdeT2UKmf2Ehxjnu65NR4RYAEK9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [Potential for creating lead magnets and building subscriber base](https://fathom.video/share/xqB1UdeT2UKmf2Ehxjnu65NR4RYAEK9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)

### Content Opportunities in AI and Leadership Space

  - [Explore topics related to communication, coaching, and leadership development](https://fathom.video/share/xqB1UdeT2UKmf2Ehxjnu65NR4RYAEK9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Target search queries about improving communication and writing skills](https://fathom.video/share/xqB1UdeT2UKmf2Ehxjnu65NR4RYAEK9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
  - [Potential to create high-value content around AI in leadership development](https://fathom.video/share/xqB1UdeT2UKmf2Ehxjnu65NR4RYAEK9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
